an1.198-208:1.0.1: (198) "Bhikkhus, the foremost of my bhikkhu disciples among those who create a mind-made body is Cullapanthaka."
an1.198-208:1.0.2: (199) " … among those skilled in mental transformation is Cullapanthaka."
an1.198-208:1.0.3: (200) " … among those skilled in the transformation of perception is Mahāpanthaka."
an1.198-208:1.0.4: (201) " … among those who dwell without conflict is Subhūti."
an1.198-208:1.0.5: (202) " … among those worthy of gifts is Subhūti."
an1.198-208:1.0.6: (203) " … among forest dwellers is Revata Khadiravaniya."
an1.198-208:1.0.8: (205) " … among those who arouse energy is Soṇa Koḷivīsa."
an1.198-208:1.0.9: (206) " … among those who are excellent speakers is Soṇa Kuṭikaṇṇa."
